Package index

All functions

clear_connections()
Clear all MySQL connections
connect_to_childes()
Connect to CHILDES
get_collections()
Get collections
get_content()
Get content
get_contexts()
Get the utterances surrounding a token(s)
get_corpora()
Get corpora
get_db_info()
Get information on database connection options
get_participants()
Get participants
get_speaker_statistics()
Get speaker statistics
get_sql_query()
Run a SQL Query script on the CHILDES database
get_table()
Get table
get_tokens()
Get tokens
get_transcripts()
Get transcripts
get_types()
Get types
get_utterances()
Get utterances

Developed by Mika Braginsky, Alessandro Sanchez, Daniel Yurovsky.
